pi_items.source: Code analysis of setup_task.sh: file path hardcoded in create_presentation() function which saves to this location
Code analysis of setup_task.sh: file path hardcoded in create_midnight_template() function which saves to this location
Code analysis of task.json description and export_result.sh which checks this file path

Code analysis of verifier.py line 102 and task.json description. These are 0-based indices corresponding to slides 1, 3, 6 in 1-based indexing. Matches task description which specifies 'Title Slide (Slide 1) and Section Header slides (Slide 3 and Slide 6)'

Code analysis of verifier.py line 103 and task.json description. These are 0-based indices corresponding to slides 2, 4, 5, 7 in 1-based indexing. Matches task description which specifies 'content slides (2, 4, 5, 7)'
Code analysis of setup_task.sh: slides_data array in create_presentation() function contains exactly 7 tuples (lines 46-54). Verifier.py line 81 checks for exactly 7 slides.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetic data generated programmatically. The presentation 'Q3_Marketing_Review.odp' contains 7 slides with content about marketing performance. Slides at 0-based indices 0, 2, and 5 (1-based: 1, 3, 6) are target slides for the Midnight master page application: 'Q3 Marketing Performance' (title slide), 'Digital Channels' (section header), and 'Events & Outreach' (section header). The remaining slides at indices 1, 3, 4, 6 (1-based: 2, 4, 5, 7) are content slides that should retain the default master. The Midnight template file is a synthetically generated ODP template with master page name 'Midnight' and dark background color #1a1a2e.
